notes: Primarily a position/argument paper (author states 'the argument is structural, not empirical') that develops three hypotheses and proposes a novel defect taxonomy. It is backed by three small self-described 'contrived' experiments: LLM reviewers run over a curated planted-bug corpus (5 functions each, multiple runs, multi-model cross-family panel) with BDD scenarios as a deterministic baseline — a controlled/benchmark-style evaluation the author explicitly frames as directional, not statistically significant. No human participants (models, not people, are the subjects).
